attributes.description: Per-turn gateway complexity classification (gateway_output.complexity). Not covered by any existing dashboard.
attributes.title: Turn Complexity Distribution
attributes.visState: {"type": "pie", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Turns"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "complexity", "size": 6, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "isDonut": true}, "title": "Turn Complexity Distribution"}

attributes.description: Gateway complexity mix per time bucket — how SIMPLE/MODERATE/COMPLEX turns trend.
attributes.title: Turn Complexity Over Time
attributes.visState: {"type": "area", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Turns"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "min_doc_count": 1}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "complexity", "size": 6, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right"}, "title": "Turn Complexity Over Time"}

attributes.description: ADR-0081 cross-turn KV reuse: avg cache_read_tokens vs avg input_tokens on model_call_completed. (prompt-cost-cache is broken on local Kibana, FRE-546.)
attributes.title: Cross-Turn KV Cache Reuse Over Time
attributes.visState: {"type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "avg", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "cache_read_tokens", "customLabel": "Avg cache-read tokens"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "avg", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "input_tokens", "customLabel": "Avg input tokens"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "min_doc_count": 1}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right"}, "title": "Cross-Turn KV Cache Reuse Over Time"}

attributes.description: Per-turn record (one gateway_output per turn): task_type/complexity/strategy/token_count joined on trace_id. The per-turn join surface (no session_id is emitted on gateway_output).
attributes.title: Turn Classification Detail

attributes.description: Distinct sessions per time bucket (cardinality of session_id over api_cost_recorded).
attributes.title: Active Sessions Over Time
attributes.visState: {"type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "cardinality", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "session_id", "customLabel": "Distinct sessions"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "min_doc_count": 1}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right"}, "title": "Active Sessions Over Time"}

attributes.description: Billable traces per session = cardinality(trace_id) over api_cost_recorded — a turns proxy, NOT a gateway_output->session join (gateway_output has no session_id).
attributes.title: Turns per Session (top 20)
attributes.visState: {"type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "cardinality", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "trace_id", "customLabel": "Distinct turns (traces)"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "session_id", "size": 20, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1"}}], "params": {"perPage": 10, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false}, "title": "Turns per Session (top 20)"}

attributes.description: Per-session LLM call volume and mean latency_ms (api_cost_recorded). The session aggregate layer request_traces (single-trace waterfall) lacks.
attributes.title: LLM Calls & Avg Latency per Session (top 20)
attributes.visState: {"type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "LLM calls"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "avg", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "latency_ms", "customLabel": "Avg latency (ms)"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "session_id", "size": 20, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1"}}], "params": {"perPage": 10, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false}, "title": "LLM Calls & Avg Latency per Session (top 20)"}

attributes.description: Trace-level error attribution (level:ERROR). Trace-keyed, not session — ERROR events rarely carry session_id (5/161).
attributes.title: Top Traces by Error Events
attributes.visState: {"type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Error events"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "trace_id", "size": 20, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1"}}], "params": {"perPage": 10, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false}, "title": "Top Traces by Error Events"}

attributes.title: Artifact-Envelope Surface — Readiness Note
attributes.visState: {"type": "markdown", "aggs": [], "params": {"markdown": "### Artifact-Envelope Integrity (ADR-0089 D5) \u2014 instrumentation-readiness surface\n\nAs of **2026-06-09** the served-envelope probe has emitted **5 docs / 0 verified probes** \u2014 the probe fires only on real edge commits. A **zero** on *Degraded Envelopes* means **no verified probes yet**, NOT a healthy fleet. These panels are correctly typed and join-ready (on `artifact_id`); they validate as artifacts are served.", "fontSize": 12, "openLinksInNewTab": true}, "title": "Artifact-Envelope Surface \u2014 Readiness Note"}

attributes.description: Distribution of artifact_envelope_integrity probe_status (verified / unverified_access_denied / probe_failed).
attributes.title: Envelope Probe Status
attributes.visState: {"type": "pie", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Probes"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "probe_status", "size": 6, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "isDonut": true}, "title": "Envelope Probe Status"}

attributes.description: ADR-0089 D5 alarm: count of verified probes whose served envelope failed (envelope_ok:false). Zero today = no verified probes yet (see readiness note), not necessarily healthy.
attributes.title: Degraded Envelopes (alarm)
attributes.visState: {"type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Degraded envelopes"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"colorSchema": "Green to Red", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 10000}], "style": {"fontSize": 60}}}, "title": "Degraded Envelopes (alarm)"}

attributes.description: artifact_gate_decision outcomes per time bucket (committed / not_applicable).
attributes.title: Gate Decisions Over Time
attributes.visState: {"type": "area", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Gate decisions"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "min_doc_count": 1}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "gate_decision", "size": 5, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right"}, "title": "Gate Decisions Over Time"}

attributes.description: Per-artifact envelope + gate record, joinable on artifact_id across the two ADR-0089 events.
attributes.title: Artifact Envelope Detail (join on artifact_id)

attributes.description: FRE-539 (C4). Turn-level analytics (complexity, cross-turn KV reuse), E2E session/trace aggregate rollups (joined on session_id/trace_id), and ADR-0089 artifact-envelope integrity. Extends (does not duplicate) llm_performance / request_traces / cost_budget / expansion_decomposition / intent_classification. Requires data_views.ndjson (shared agent-logs-pattern) to import first.
attributes.title: C4 — Turn, Session & Artifact Analytics
